---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for DockPulse
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include CLI interface examples if applicable:

```bash
dockpulse new-command --flag value
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
